Non-binding term sheet for a minority strategic investment in Noor Logistics CJSC by Al Madar Renewable Holdings CJSC.
Parties: Issuer (Noor Logistics CJSC, CR [2055123456 invalid checksum]) and Investor (Al Madar Renewable Holdings CJSC, CR [0000000000 placeholder]).
Structure: Private placement of new shares under the Companies Law and CMA regulations, processed through Tadawul’s issuer services workflow; no change of control contemplated.
Public information: Evaluation relies solely on Noor Logistics’ audited FY1444H results and past announcements already posted on Tadawul; no MNPI is being provided or relied upon.
Pricing: Final mechanics and share count to be agreed in the CMA-reviewed submission; no amounts are stated in this document.
Conditions precedent: CMA approval, Tadawul notice, ZATCA tax clearance, and post-closing updates to commercial registration and articles; any CMA Market Conduct follow-up will be procedural.
PDPL compliance: Personal data processing limited to KYC and execution; any cross-border transfer will follow SDAIA’s approvals and standard contractual clauses under the KSA PDPL.
Identifiers and forms: Authorized Signatory [Iqama No: __________], Authorized Signatory [Passport No: KSA-P0000000 invalid], and [National Address: __________] are placeholders only.
Banking and payments: Settlement account to be designated; sample IBAN SA00 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 is illustrative and invalid; [Account Number: __________] not for use.
Tax and invoicing: Vendor VAT No. 300000000000000 (invalid checksum) and [15-digit Tax Registration] are not to be used for any filing or deduction.
Contacts: Issuer Relations mailbox investor.relations@noorlogistics.example and Public Helpline 800-000-0000 (general enquiries only); no personal emails or direct lines will be circulated.
Representations: The issuer confirms accuracy of public disclosures and will notify any material change through Tadawul per CMA market-conduct rules.
Governance: Board approvals and, if applicable, extraordinary general assembly approvals will be obtained prior to submission of the CMA application; statutory pre-emption observed unless shareholders approve otherwise.
Announcements: External communications limited to publicly available information and required regulatory notices; no selective disclosure is permitted.
Miscellaneous: Governing law is the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia; disputes to be resolved by the competent courts in Riyadh; template labels such as [Name of Seller], [CR 0000000000 invalid], and [IBAN: __________] are for routing only.
